generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who's spent 20 years in emergency management, I'm telling you: our civil defense systems are dangerously outdated. We're not just talking about natural disasters - in today's world, being prepared means being ready for anything. The experts at the National Security Institute agree: we need to invest in modernizing our civil defense infrastructure NOW. Don't wait until it's too late. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
